items.serviceCoverage: Full property valuation services for all Blocks tokenized assets across UAE. Preferred partner pricing agreed.
items.notes: Active partner. Integration in beta phase. API-based valuation requests live.

items.serviceCoverage: Legal services for SPV formation, regulatory compliance, contract review, and token issuance legal framework.
items.notes: Preferred legal partner. Retained for all UAE legal matters. Quarterly retainer model.

items.serviceCoverage: Annual audit services for platform financials, SPV audit, and compliance attestation.
items.notes: Fee structure under negotiation. Contract expected to close in July.

items.serviceCoverage: KYC/AML identity verification, document verification, biometric matching, and ongoing monitoring.
items.notes: Live in production. Integration completed Q1 2026. Monthly performance reviews.

items.serviceCoverage: Digital asset custody services, fiat settlement accounts, and payment processing.
items.notes: Due diligence ongoing. Regulatory comfort assessment in progress. Security architecture review scheduled.

items.serviceCoverage: Payment processing for fiat-to-crypto on-ramp, subscription payments, and payout services.
items.notes: Initial discussions positive. Technical requirements document being shared.

items.serviceCoverage: Property management services for tokenized assets including tenant management, maintenance, and rent collection.
items.notes: Potential partner identified. Preliminary research conducted. Outreach not yet initiated.

items.serviceCoverage: Sharia compliance advisory and certification for tokenized real estate structures.
items.notes: Discussions ended due to scope mismatch. Deloitte's Islamic finance practice focused on retail banking, not real estate tokenization.

dueDiligenceRecords.regulatoryComfort: Savills is a well-established international firm with strong UAE presence. No regulatory concerns identified.
dueDiligenceRecords.capacityAssessment: Adequate team size and expertise for Blocks' projected volume. Valuation capacity of 20 properties per month confirmed.
dueDiligenceRecords.conflictsIdentified: None. Savills does not have relationships with competing platforms that would create conflicts.
dueDiligenceRecords.overallAssessment: Low risk. Strong partner with proven track record. Recommended for onboarding.

dueDiligenceRecords.regulatoryComfort: Provider A holds relevant data protection certifications. GDPR and UAE PDPL compliance confirmed.
dueDiligenceRecords.capacityAssessment: Scalable infrastructure. Handled 50K+ verifications monthly for existing clients.
dueDiligenceRecords.conflictsIdentified: Provider A also serves Stake (competitor). Chinese wall procedures confirmed.
dueDiligenceRecords.overallAssessment: Low risk. Established KYC provider with strong compliance framework.

dueDiligenceRecords.regulatoryCompliance: FAB is UAE Central Bank regulated. Digital asset custody framework under regulatory review.
dueDiligenceRecords.regulatoryComfort: Custody offering is new for FAB's digital asset division. Requiring additional assurance on security architecture.
dueDiligenceRecords.capacityAssessment: Partnership scope not yet finalized. Capacity assessment pending scope definition.
dueDiligenceRecords.overallAssessment: Medium risk. Requires further due diligence on digital asset custody capabilities and regulatory compliance.

dueDiligenceRecords.regulatoryComfort: KPMG is a Big 4 audit firm with strong UAE regulatory compliance. No concerns.
dueDiligenceRecords.capacityAssessment: Full audit team allocated for Blocks engagement. Capacity confirmed.
dueDiligenceRecords.conflictsIdentified: KPMG also audits certain competitors. Chinese wall arrangements confirmed.
dueDiligenceRecords.overallAssessment: Low risk. Big 4 credentials. Pending final pricing agreement.

useCaseMapping.slaExpectation: 48 hours for standard valuation, 24 hours for expedited
useCaseMapping.notes: API integration in beta. Manual fallback process documented.

useCaseMapping.slaExpectation: Quarterly revaluation cycle, 5 business days per portfolio

useCaseMapping.notes: Standard process. Template documents available for common structures.

useCaseMapping.slaExpectation: Ongoing retainer, 24-hour response for urgent matters

useCaseMapping.notes: Live integration. 85th percentile SLA currently at 3.2 minutes.

90days.description: 90-day partnerships dashboard with pipeline velocity, due diligence progress, and use case coverage.

12months.description: 12-month strategic partnerships dashboard with full ecosystem coverage and integration milestones.
